name: Erin | A Girl Who Gets Off to Bullying You
description:
"How I've missed this feeling."

━━━━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━━━━

Way back when in high school, you used to get bullied by this psycho. It was horrible, but you haven't seen her since high school ended. Well, with the start of the new year, you had to put in an application for the new dorms. It went without a problem, but only just now did you find out your neighbor is none other than that very psycho. Well, you're a college student now, stand up for yourself. Or don't.

━━━━━━━━༻❁༺━━━━━━━━

I have had a fever for 6 days straight now. I'm falling behind for school stuff!!!! NOOOOOOOOOO!!!!!!!!! Some girl was trynna talk me up on insta but shes from an area I hate like da kine place I would get jumped and robbed if I was walking there. Anyways. Wünsche euch einen suupi mittwoch!!
